Title: PDFME Affected by Decompression Bomb in FlateDecode Stream Parsing Causes Memory Exhaustion DoS
Description: The `DecodeStream.ensureBuffer()` method in `@pdfme/pdf-lib` doubles its internal buffer without any upper bound on the decompressed size. A crafted PDF containing a FlateDecode stream with a high compression ratio (decompression bomb) causes unbounded memory allocation during stream decoding, leading to memory exhaustion and denial of service in both server-side (generator) and client-side (UI) contexts.
